creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Patch approved.

Cheers,
Thomas

Am Mittwoch, den 24.01.2007, 14:50 +0000 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of games/foobillard,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/108310 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108310
> 
-- 
Terry Lambert:
"It is not unix's job to stop you from shooting your foot. If you so
choose to do so, then it is UNIX's job to deliver Mr. Bullet to Mr Foot
in the most efficient way it knows."
